extension.valueString: The astronaut/crewmember subject of this medical requirement

name: MEDB22MRSAScreening
title: MEDB 2.2 MRSA Screening
description: NASA Medical Requirements Integration Document for MRSA screening. Screens crew members for Methicillin-resistant Staphylococcus aureus colonization prior to spaceflight.
purpose: To screen crew members for MRSA colonization prior to spaceflight to prevent transmission in the closed ISS environment
copyright: NASA Johnson Space Center - Medical Requirements Integration Documents (MRIDs) JSC28913

initial.valueString: To screen crew members for MRSA colonization prior to spaceflight. Positive cases require decolonization treatment before flight.
Nasal swab collection from both nares for MRSA culture or PCR testing.
L-60 to L-30 days, with retest at L-10 if initially positive

code.display: MRSA DNA [Presence] in Nose by NAA with probe detection

item.text: No specific postflight MRSA screening required
